'''√w-sh-k''' ('''kawashak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quasiquote|quasiquote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quasiquote|quasiquote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-sh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kawashak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiwashak || jiwashak || shiwashak || kiwashak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuwashak || jujuwashak || shushuwashak || kukuwashak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuwashak || juwashak || shuwashak || kuwashak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuwashak || juwashak || shuwashak || kuwashak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thewashak || jewashak || shewashak || kewashak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothowashak || jojowashak || shoshowashak || kokowashak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thowashak || jowashak || showashak || kowashak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thowashak || jowashak || showashak || kowashak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || washak || washak || washak || washak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || washak || washak || washak || washak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || washak || washak || washak || washak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || washak || washak || washak || washak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæwashak || jæwashak || shæwashak || kæwashak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathawashak || jajawashak || shashawashak || kakawashak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thawashak || jawashak || shawashak || kawashak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thawashak || jawashak || shawashak || kawashak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shawashak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshawashak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishawashak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shawashaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshawashaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishawashaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shawashakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshawashaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishawashakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shawashakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshawashaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishawashakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shawashakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshawashaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishawashakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shawashaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshawashaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishawashaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shawashakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshawashaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishawashakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shawashakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshawashaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishawashakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shawashakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshawashaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishawashakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shawashaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshawashaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishawashaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shawashaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawashaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawashaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shawashaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshawashaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawashaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shawashakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshawashaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishawashakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shawashakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawashaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawashakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shawashakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshawashaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawashakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shawashakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshawashaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishawashakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shawashakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshawashaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishawashakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shawashakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshawashaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawashakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shawashakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshawashaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishawashakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shawashakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshawashaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishawashakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shawashakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawashaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawashakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
